articles.title: RoboScience 发布通用具身大模型 Visics，VLOA 双引擎现场演示家具拼装
articles.title_en: RoboScience Launches Universal Embodied Model Visics, Live-Demos Furniture Assembly with VLOA Dual-Engine
articles.summary: 深圳发布的 Visics 通用具身大模型采用 VLOA 双引擎架构，覆盖视觉、语言、物体和动作理解，现场完成家具拼装等复杂操作。
articles.summary_en: Visics, launched in Shenzhen, uses a VLOA dual-engine architecture covering vision, language, object and action understanding, demonstrating complex tasks like furniture assembly live.
articles.content: RoboScience 机器科学在深圳发布通用具身大模型 Visics，并完整展示 VLOA 双引擎架构，覆盖视觉、语言、物体和动作理解。现场展示包括家具拼装等复杂操作任务，意在验证模型在真实机器人场景中的泛化能力。具身智能最怕只停留在实验室视频，复杂装配任务如果能稳定复现，说明模型正在靠近可交付的产业能力。
articles.content_en: RoboScience unveiled Visics — a universal embodied model — in Shenzhen, showcasing its VLOA dual-engine architecture covering vision, language, object and action understanding. Live demos included complex tasks like furniture assembly, verifying generalization in real robot scenarios. Embodied AI's fear is staying as lab videos — stable complex assembly proves the model is approaching deliverable industrial capability.
key_points: VLOA 双引擎架构
现场家具拼装演示
通用具身大模型
key_points_en: VLOA dual-engine architecture
Live furniture assembly demo
Universal embodied model

articles.title: OpenAI 与博通联合发布首颗自研 AI 推理芯片 Jalapeño，9 个月完成流片
articles.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Jalapeño, First Custom Inference Chip Taped Out in 9 Months
articles.summary: 当地时间 6 月 24 日，OpenAI 与博通正式发布定制 ASIC「Jalapeño」，专为大模型推理设计；OpenAI 负责架构，博通负责流片与网络硬件，Celestica 提供板卡与机架，工程样片已运行 GPT-5.3、Codex 和 Spark，2026 年底前进入首次部署。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom officially announced Jalapeño on June 24, a custom ASIC purpose-built for LLM inference. OpenAI led architecture, Broadcom handled silicon implementation and networking hardware, while Celestica integrated boards and racks. Engineering samples are already running GPT-5.3, Codex and Spark, with first deployment slated before end of 2026.
articles.source: OpenAI 官网 / 第一财经
articles.content: OpenAI 与博通联合宣布推出 Jalapeño 芯片，这是 OpenAI 历史上首款定制 AI 推理 ASIC，从设计到流片仅用 9 个月。OpenAI 在公告中强调，Jalapeño 是其「多代计算平台」的第一步，2026 年底前完成首次部署，并将在未来几年持续扩展。早期实验室测试显示，Jalapeño 在量产目标频率与功耗下，每瓦性能将「优于当前最先进水平」。OpenAI 与博通的分工是：OpenAI 主导底层架构，博通负责硅片实现与网络硬件，加拿大电子制造商 Celestica 完成板卡和机架集成。值得一提的是，OpenAI 在芯片设计过程中复用了自家大模型进行 EDA 加速，被业内形容为「用 AI 来设计跑 AI 的芯片」。
articles.content_en: OpenAI and Broadcom jointly announced Jalapeño, OpenAI's first custom AI inference ASIC, taken from concept to tape-out in just 9 months. OpenAI calls Jalapeño the first step of its multi-generation compute platform, with initial deployment scheduled before the end of 2026 and continued expansion in the years to come. Early lab tests indicate Jalapeño's per-watt performance, at target production frequency and power, will exceed today's state of the art. OpenAI led architecture design, Broadcom handled silicon implementation and networking hardware, and Canadian electronics manufacturer Celestica integrated boards and racks. Notably, OpenAI used its own models to accelerate EDA workflows during chip design—an approach the industry calls 'using AI to design chips that run AI.'
key_points: Jalapeño 是 OpenAI 历史上首颗自研推理 ASIC
从立项到流片仅 9 个月，已运行 GPT-5.3、Codex 与 Spark
2026 年底前完成首次部署，未来多代持续扩展
每瓦性能官方称「优于当前最先进水平」
key_points_en: Jalapeño is OpenAI's first in-house inference ASIC
Only 9 months from concept to tape-out, already running GPT-5.3, Codex and Spark
First deployment before end of 2026, multi-generation roadmap
Per-watt performance claimed to exceed current state of the art

articles.title: 黄仁勋股东大会：Blackwell 是「推理之王」，Vera CPU 专属智能体
articles.title_en: Jensen Huang at Annual Meeting: Blackwell Is the King of Inference, Vera CPU Built for Agents
articles.summary: 6 月 24 日英伟达召开年度股东大会，黄仁勋全面阐述 AI 基础设施扩张蓝图：2026 财年营收 2160 亿美元、增长 65%，数据中心收入 1940 亿美元、增长 68%；计划未来将 50% 或更多自由现金流返还股东，并宣称智能体时代将带来 60 年来最大规模的行业重置。
articles.summary_en: At NVIDIA's annual shareholder meeting on June 24, Jensen Huang detailed his AI infrastructure thesis: FY2026 revenue $216B (up 65%), data center revenue $194B (up 68%). NVIDIA plans to return 50% or more of free cash flow to shareholders and frames the coming agent era as the biggest industry reset in 60 years.
articles.source: 凤凰网科技 / 第一财经
articles.content: 黄仁勋在英伟达年度股东大会上「自夸」三大产品：Blackwell 是「推理之王」、Vera CPU 是智能体专属、CUDA 是不可逾越的生态护城河。他披露 2026 财年营收 2160 亿美元（同比 +65%）、数据中心收入 1940 亿美元（+68%），经营现金流 1030 亿美元，向股东返还 410 亿美元；同时承诺未来将 50% 或更多自由现金流通过回购与股息返还股东。面对市场对 AI 资本开支可持续性的疑虑，他表示「有用的 AI」已经到来、能赚钱，市场对投资回报率「已有答案」，并预测智能体时代将引发 60 年来规模最大的计算范式转移。
articles.content_en: At NVIDIA's annual shareholder meeting, Jensen Huang spotlighted three pillars: Blackwell as 'king of inference,' Vera CPU as the dedicated agent silicon, and CUDA as the unbreachable ecosystem moat. He disclosed FY2026 revenue of $216B (up 65% YoY), data center revenue of $194B (up 68%), $103B in operating cash flow and $41B returned to shareholders. NVIDIA plans to return at least 50% of future free cash flow via buybacks and dividends. Addressing concerns about the sustainability of AI capex, Huang argued that 'useful AI' has arrived and is already monetizing, calling the agent era the largest computing paradigm shift in 60 years.
key_points: FY2026 营收 2160 亿美元、同比增长 65%
数据中心收入 1940 亿美元、占比超 80%
承诺返还 50%+ 自由现金流给股东
认为智能体时代将是 60 年最大计算范式转移
key_points_en: FY2026 revenue $216B, up 65% YoY
Data center revenue $194B, over 80% of total
Pledges 50%+ free cash flow return to shareholders
Calls the agent era the biggest compute paradigm shift in 60 years

articles.title: DeepSeek 完成 510 亿元 A 轮融资后官宣全员扩招，所有部门规模翻倍
articles.title_en: DeepSeek Launches Company-Wide Doubling After 51 Billion Yuan Series A
articles.summary: 6 月 25 日晚 9:35，DeepSeek 在官方公众号发布历年最大规模的招聘公告，覆盖算法、AI 核心系统、运维、产品、模型数据策略、深度学习研究员、职能等 7 大类、33 个岗位，所有部门规模至少扩大一倍，工作地点为北京、杭州。
articles.summary_en: On June 25 at 9:35 PM, DeepSeek published its largest hiring announcement ever, covering 33 roles across 7 categories—algorithms, AI core systems, ops, product, model data strategy, deep learning research, and corporate functions. All departments will at least double, with offices in Beijing and Hangzhou.
articles.content: DeepSeek 于 6 月 25 日晚发布历年最大规模招聘信息，宣布「寻找闪亮发光的你」，将所有部门规模扩大至少一倍。这是继其 6 月初完成约 510 亿元人民币 A 轮融资、估值突破 520 亿美元之后的最重要动作。招聘覆盖 7 大类、33 个岗位，包含算法、AI 核心系统研发、运维、产品、模型数据策略、深度学习研究员（含 Frontier 持续学习 / 自进化 / 新范式方向），以及 HR、行政等职能团队，所有岗位均接受实习。「我们从来不寻找天才。只要你有自身闪亮发光的地方，你就是我们要寻找的人。」公告中的这句话短时间内引爆社交网络，半小时阅读量近 10 万。
articles.content_en: DeepSeek released its largest-ever hiring drive on the evening of June 25, declaring it is 'looking for those who shine.' All departments will at least double—the most significant move since its roughly 51 billion yuan Series A round in early June, which valued the company above $52B. The recruitment spans 7 categories and 33 roles, covering algorithms, AI core systems, ops, product, model data strategy, deep learning researchers (including Frontier directions—continual learning, self-evolution, new paradigms), plus HR and corporate functions. Every role accepts interns. Its tagline 'We don't look for geniuses—if you shine in your own way, we want you' went viral within minutes.
key_points: 所有部门规模至少扩大一倍
覆盖 7 大类、33 个岗位，含 Frontier 研究员
工作地点北京、杭州，所有岗位接受实习
继 510 亿元 A 轮融资后最重要动作
key_points_en: Every department to at least double in size
33 roles across 7 categories, including Frontier researchers
Beijing and Hangzhou offices, all roles open to interns
Most significant move since the 51 billion yuan Series A

articles.title: Z.ai 发布 GLM-5.2 登顶开源模型榜首，IndexShare 架构让百万上下文成本下降 2.9 倍
articles.title_en: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Tops Open-Source Ranking; IndexShare Cuts Million-Token Compute 2.9×
articles.summary: Z.ai 推出 7530 亿参数 MoE 模型 GLM-5.2，激活约 400 亿参数，原生百万 token 上下文，在 Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 上以 51 分位列全球第一开源模型，6 月 16 日已在 Hugging Face 以 MIT 协议开源。
articles.summary_en: Z.ai unveiled GLM-5.2, a 753-billion-parameter MoE model with ~40B active parameters and a native 1M token context. It ranked #1 among open-weight models on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 with a score of 51. Open weights are available on Hugging Face under the MIT license since June 16.
articles.content: GLM-5.2 是 Z.ai 推出的混合专家模型，总参数 7530 亿、每 token 激活约 400 亿，上下文窗口从 GLM-5.1 的 20 万扩展到 100 万。在独立评测 Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 中以 51 分登顶开源榜，领先 MiniMax-M3、DeepSeek V4 Pro（均 44 分）与 Kimi K2.6（43 分）。架构创新「IndexShare」让稀疏注意力四层共享一个轻量级索引器，把百万上下文的 FLOPs 减少 2.9 倍，配合 MTP 投机解码可再提高约 20% 接受长度。Z.ai 将其定位为代理式编程工具，并在 Code Arena WebDev 上紧追 Claude Fable 5 位列第二。完整权重 1.51 TB，本地部署需要约 256 GB 内存，硬件门槛仍然偏高。
articles.content_en: GLM-5.2 is Z.ai's Mixture-of-Experts flagship, with 753B total parameters and roughly 40B active per token, expanding context from GLM-5.1's 200K to 1M tokens. In the independent Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 it leads all open-weight models with a score of 51, ahead of MiniMax-M3, DeepSeek V4 Pro (both 44) and Kimi K2.6 (43). Its IndexShare innovation shares one lightweight indexer across four sparse attention layers, cutting per-token FLOPs at 1M context by 2.9×, while MTP speculative decoding boosts acceptance length by up to 20%. Z.ai positions GLM-5.2 as an agentic coding tool; on Code Arena WebDev it ranks second, trailing only Claude Fable 5. Full weights are 1.51 TB and local deployment still requires roughly 256 GB of memory.
key_points: MoE 总参数 7530 亿，激活约 400 亿
原生百万 token 上下文，AAI v4.1 开源第一
IndexShare 把百万上下文 FLOPs 降 2.9×
MIT 协议开源，部署门槛 256 GB 内存
key_points_en: 753B-parameter MoE with ~40B active per token
Native 1M-token context, #1 open-weight on AAI v4.1
IndexShare cuts FLOPs at 1M context by 2.9×
MIT-licensed weights, ~256GB RAM to run locally

articles.title: 招商银行股东大会披露大模型账本：日均 330 亿 Token，AI 与人力工时比逼近 1:9
articles.title_en: China Merchants Bank Reveals 33 Billion Daily Tokens, AI-to-Human Hours Ratio Nears 1:9
articles.summary: 招商银行 6 月 25 日股东大会上，副行长周天虹披露：截至 2026 年 5 月底，AI 处理业务与人工实际投入工时比从 2025 年底的 1:13 提升到接近 1:9；日均 Token 消耗 330 亿，零售场景的 AI 投入产出比达到 1:5（投入 20 赚 100）。
articles.summary_en: At China Merchants Bank's annual meeting on June 25, EVP Zhou Tianhong disclosed that as of end-May 2026 the bank's AI-to-human work-hour ratio improved to nearly 1:9 (from 1:13 at end-2025), with 33 billion daily token consumption and an ROI of roughly 1:5 in retail scenarios.
articles.source: 招商银行 / 扣子新闻
articles.content: 在国内银行业最早系统披露大模型成本与收益的招商银行 6 月 25 日股东大会上，副行长周天虹给出一份「大模型账本」：AI 处理业务对应的工时与人类员工实际投入工时的比值，已从 2025 年底的 1:13 提升至 2026 年 5 月底的接近 1:9，其中零售领域改善尤为显著。在成本侧，招行已在科技条线建立成本核算体系，全行大模型日均消耗 Token 约 330 亿；测算显示典型场景下 AI 投入与产出比约 1:5——「投 20 赚 100」。「我们不追求最炫的模型，追求能够稳定承载真实业务流的模型组合。」周天虹强调，招行将继续在零售、风控与运营三大场景深化大模型应用，并稳步扩展到对公领域。
articles.content_en: At the June 25 annual meeting, CMB EVP Zhou Tianhong shared one of the first detailed LLM cost-benefit disclosures from a Chinese bank. The AI-to-human work-hour ratio rose from 1:13 at end-2025 to nearly 1:9 by end-May 2026, with retail seeing the biggest gain. On cost, CMB now consumes about 33 billion tokens per day across the bank, and typical scenarios show roughly a 1:5 ROI—'put in 20, earn 100.' 'We don't chase the flashiest model; we chase the model mix that can reliably carry real business flows,' Zhou said, signaling continued depth in retail, risk control and operations, with a measured expansion to corporate banking.
key_points: AI 与人力工时比从 1:13 升至 1:9
全行日均消耗 Token 约 330 亿
典型场景 AI 投入产出比 1:5
零售场景效果最显著，继续向对公扩展
key_points_en: AI-to-human hours ratio improves from 1:13 to ~1:9
Bank-wide daily token usage ~33 billion
Typical scenario AI ROI ~1:5
Retail leads gains, expansion into corporate banking next

articles.title: 谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Pro 推迟至 7 月，OpenAI GPT-5.6 同步延期
articles.title_en: Google Delays Gemini 3.5 Pro to July, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Slips Too
articles.summary: 谷歌 DeepMind 因对模型现状不满，取消了 Gemini 3.5 Pro 原定 6 月底发布计划，推迟至 7 月；几乎同期，OpenAI 也将 GPT-5.6 正式版推迟至 7 月中旬，但新一代双向语音模型 Bidi 的内测准备仍在 ChatGPT 平台推进。
articles.summary_en: Google DeepMind pulled the planned end-of-June launch of Gemini 3.5 Pro, citing dissatisfaction with the current model and pushing it to July. Around the same time, OpenAI delayed GPT-5.6's general release to mid-July, while its new bi-directional voice model Bidi continues internal testing in ChatGPT.
articles.content: 原定 6 月底的两大旗舰模型「双线发布周」被同步推迟。谷歌 DeepMind 取消了 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的 6 月发布计划，将其推后至 7 月——内部对模型表现尚不满意，仍需进一步打磨；几乎同期，知名科技博主爆料 OpenAI 将 GPT-5.6 推迟至 7 月中旬。此前 OpenAI 曾确认 GPT-5.6 的发布窗口在 6 月 22-28 日，更曾以 150 万 token 上下文、Playwright 浏览器自动化、SVG 3D 生成等能力为卖点。同期，OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 内推进新一代双向语音模型 Bidi 的内测准备，最快 7 月可见雏形。两家头部模型公司的延期，使智谱 GLM-5.2、Anthropic Claude Sonnet-5 等开源/闭源新选手获得更多舆论空间。
articles.content_en: What was supposed to be a frontier-model double-launch in late June has been pushed out. Google DeepMind canceled Gemini 3.5 Pro's June release, deferring it to July—internally the team is not satisfied with current performance. Almost simultaneously, prominent tech bloggers report that OpenAI has delayed GPT-5.6's launch to mid-July; the model had previously been positioned with a 1.5M-token context, native Playwright browser automation and SVG 3D generation. OpenAI is meanwhile preparing internal testing of Bidi, its next-generation bi-directional voice model in ChatGPT, with an early build potentially visible in July. The dual delay leaves more oxygen for open and closed-weight challengers including Zhipu's GLM-5.2 and Anthropic's Claude Sonnet-5.
key_points: Gemini 3.5 Pro 从 6 月推迟至 7 月
GPT-5.6 推迟至 7 月中旬
OpenAI 同步内测双向语音模型 Bidi
为 GLM-5.2、Claude Sonnet-5 等留出窗口
key_points_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro slips from June to July
GPT-5.6 delayed to mid-July
OpenAI internally testing Bidi voice model
Opens room for GLM-5.2 and Claude Sonnet-5

articles.title: 字节豆包专业版正式上线，三级订阅最高 5088 元/年
articles.title_en: ByteDance's Doubao Pro Goes Live with Three-Tier Pricing Up to 5,088 Yuan/Year
articles.summary: 字节跳动 6 月 24 日正式上线豆包专业版，采用三级订阅：标准版 68 元/月、加强版 200 元/月、高级版 500 元/月，对应年度最高 5088 元；底层依托新一代豆包 2.1 系列大模型，主打复杂办公与生产力场景。
articles.summary_en: ByteDance officially launched Doubao Pro on June 24 with a three-tier subscription: Standard 68 yuan/month, Plus 200, Premium 500—up to 5,088 yuan annually. It is powered by the new Doubao 2.1 model family and targets complex productivity workloads.
articles.content: 字节跳动 6 月 24 日正式发布豆包专业版，让此前喧嚣多日的豆包付费靴子终于落地。专业版基于刚刚发布的豆包 2.1 系列大模型（含 Pro、Turbo、Seedance 2.5 视频生成等），面向复杂办公和生产力场景：复杂分析、长文档处理、办公任务模式等。三级订阅价格分别为 68 元、200 元、500 元/月，连续包年最高 5088 元，对应额度依次翻倍；免费用户也能体验由豆包 2.1 Turbo 驱动的办公任务模式。同期火山引擎宣布豆包大模型 2.1 Pro 每百万 Token 输入价格 6 元，正面对标 DeepSeek V4-Pro 与 GLM-5.2，掀开中国大模型 To C 与 To B 价格战的新一幕。
articles.content_en: ByteDance officially launched Doubao Pro on June 24, ending months of speculation about its consumer paywall. The Pro tier sits on the freshly released Doubao 2.1 model family (Pro, Turbo, Seedance 2.5 video, etc.) and targets complex office and productivity workloads—analysis, long-document reasoning and an office task mode. Subscriptions are tiered at 68, 200 and 500 yuan/month (up to 5,088 yuan/year), with quotas doubling at each tier. Free users still get the office task mode powered by Doubao 2.1 Turbo. Volcano Engine also priced Doubao 2.1 Pro at 6 yuan per million input tokens, taking direct aim at DeepSeek V4-Pro and GLM-5.2 and lighting up a new front in China's LLM price war across both consumer and enterprise.
key_points: 三级订阅 68/200/500 元/月，年度最高 5088 元
底层为豆包 2.1 系列含 Seedance 2.5 视频生成
免费用户保留豆包 2.1 Turbo 办公任务模式
API 每百万输入 6 元，加码大模型价格战
key_points_en: Three tiers at 68/200/500 yuan/month, up to 5,088 yuan/year
Powered by Doubao 2.1 family incl. Seedance 2.5 video
Free users keep Doubao 2.1 Turbo office task mode
API at 6 yuan per million input tokens, escalating price war

articles.title: Anthropic 换联合创始人 Tom Brown 对接美政府，Fable 5 解禁谈判重启
articles.title_en: Anthropic Swaps in Co-Founder Tom Brown to Talk to Washington, Fable 5 Re-Approval Restarts
articles.summary: Wired 6 月 25 日报道，Anthropic 已让联合创始人 Tom Brown 取代 CEO Dario Amodei 与白宫对接，双方就 Claude Fable 5 解禁重启谈判；美国此前以「越狱风险」为由于 6 月 12 日强制下线 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5。
articles.summary_en: Wired reported on June 25 that Anthropic has replaced CEO Dario Amodei with co-founder Tom Brown as the company's main interface with the White House. Talks on lifting the ban of Claude Fable 5 have restarted after the U.S. forced the model offline on June 12 over jailbreak risks.
articles.content: Wired 6 月 25 日援引多位知情人士报道，特朗普政府近期与 Anthropic 的沟通顺畅了不少：双方已重启 Claude Fable 5 大模型重新上线的会谈，由 Anthropic 联合创始人 Tom Brown 取代 CEO Dario Amodei 出席。「Tom 不像 Dario 那样难以沟通，能真正坐下来务实交流。」一位直接参与通话的知情人士称。美方此前以「存在绕过模型安全护栏、解锁 Mythos 高阶能力的破解手段」为由，于 6 月 12 日强制下线 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5；直到今日，出口管制仍未解除。双方会谈分为高层会晤与工作组技术对接两层，部分议题聚焦 Anthropic 需要提交何种等级的安全验证材料，才能打消政府对越狱风险的担忧。重新上线的具体时间尚未确定。
articles.content_en: Citing multiple insiders, Wired reported on June 25 that the Trump administration's dialogue with Anthropic has become 'noticeably smoother' after co-founder Tom Brown replaced CEO Dario Amodei as the company's lead interlocutor on Claude Fable 5's re-approval. 'Tom is not as hard to talk to as Dario—he actually sits down for pragmatic conversation,' said one source. Washington had forced Fable 5 and Mythos 5 offline on June 12, citing techniques that could bypass safety guardrails and unlock Mythos's higher-tier capabilities; export controls remain in place. Talks are now split between executive sessions and working-group technical exchanges, focused in part on the level of safety evidence Anthropic must provide to ease jailbreak concerns. A re-launch date has not yet been set.
key_points: 联合创始人 Tom Brown 取代 CEO 对接美政府
Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 自 6 月 12 日被强制下线
工作组聚焦安全验证材料等级
重新上线时间仍未确定
key_points_en: Co-founder Tom Brown replaces CEO in Washington talks
Fable 5 and Mythos 5 offline since June 12
Working groups focus on level of safety evidence required
Re-launch date still undecided

articles.title: 美团开源 VitaBench 2.0：首个面向长期动态用户建模的智能体评测基准
articles.title_en: Meituan Open-Sources VitaBench 2.0, First Benchmark for Long-Horizon Dynamic Agents
articles.summary: 美团 LongCat 团队 6 月 25 日开源 VitaBench 2.0，以外卖点餐、餐厅就餐、旅游出行三大高频场景为载体，构建 66 个工具的交互式评测环境，系统性评测大模型在长期、真实、动态用户互动中的个性化与主动性能力。
articles.summary_en: Meituan's LongCat team open-sourced VitaBench 2.0 on June 25—a benchmark that uses three high-frequency life scenarios (food delivery, dine-in and travel) to build an interactive environment with 66 tools, systematically evaluating LLMs on personalization and initiative across long-running, real-world user interactions.
articles.source: 美团 LongCat / 扣子新闻
articles.content: 美团 LongCat 团队 6 月 25 日发布并开源 VitaBench 2.0，这是首个面向长期动态用户建模、基于真实生活场景的智能体评测基准。VitaBench 2.0 以外卖点餐、餐厅就餐、旅游出行三大高频生活场景为载体，构建了一个包含 66 个工具的交互式评测环境，覆盖商品检索、菜单查询、预订、点餐、行程规划等典型动作。基准聚焦三类能力：长期记忆与偏好建模、主动性（在用户尚未表达需求时给出合理推荐）、以及在动态变化（库存、价格、天气等）下的稳健决策。美团方面表示，未来将把更多本地生活场景纳入基准，并与社区共建标准化的智能体落地评估方法论。
articles.content_en: Meituan's LongCat team released and open-sourced VitaBench 2.0 on June 25—the first benchmark explicitly designed for long-horizon dynamic user modeling in real-life scenarios. VitaBench 2.0 uses three high-frequency settings—food delivery, dine-in and travel—to build an interactive evaluation environment with 66 tools spanning product search, menus, reservations, ordering and itinerary planning. It evaluates three capabilities: long-term memory and preference modeling, initiative (offering reasonable recommendations before users articulate them), and robust decision-making under dynamic changes such as stock, price and weather. Meituan plans to add more local-service scenarios and co-develop a standardized methodology for evaluating production-grade agents with the community.
key_points: 首个面向长期动态用户建模的智能体基准
覆盖外卖、餐厅、旅游 3 大高频生活场景
构建 66 个工具的交互式评测环境
聚焦长期记忆、主动性与动态决策
key_points_en: First benchmark for long-horizon dynamic user modeling
Covers food delivery, dine-in and travel scenarios
Interactive environment with 66 tools
Focuses on memory, initiative and dynamic decision making

articles.title: 链博会与 MWC 上海同台亮相具身智能：2026 年国内人形机器人交付目标 5 万台
articles.title_en: China Supply Chain Expo and MWC Shanghai Showcase Embodied AI; Domestic Humanoid Target Hits 50K Units in 2026
articles.summary: 6 月 24-26 日的 MWC 上海 2026 与链博会同步开张，具身智能成为最高曝光赛道：摩根士丹利上调国内人形机器人 2026 年交付目标至 5 万台，IDC 上调全球出货预期至 4.2 万台、同比 +133%；电子皮肤、视触觉传感器等核心部件首次实现万套级量产。
articles.summary_en: MWC Shanghai 2026 and the China Supply Chain Expo, running June 24-26, both spotlight embodied AI. Morgan Stanley raised its 2026 humanoid robot delivery target in China to 50,000 units, while IDC lifted global shipments to 42,000 (up 133% YoY). Core parts such as e-skin and visuo-tactile sensors crossed the 10,000-unit mark for the first time.
articles.content: 6 月 24-26 日，MWC 上海 2026 与第三届链博会同步开幕，具身智能成为最高密度赛道。MWC 现场首次举行「人形机器人点球大战」，8 组机器人完成两天淘汰赛；链博会则展出从核心零部件、整机系统到场景应用的完整产业闭环。摩根士丹利在 5 月发布的报告中将国内 2026 年人形机器人交付目标上调至 5 万台，IDC 同步将全球出货预期上调至 4.2 万台、同比 +133%。在国内市场，电子皮肤、视触觉传感器等关键部件正在跨过万套级量产门槛——华威科 6 月披露电子皮肤累计发货突破 1 万套，年内有望进入 5 万台年级别交付。云深处科技、特斯拉 Optimus、优必选 Walker、小米 CyberOne、波士顿动力 Atlas 等四巨头同台亮相，分别从工业、物流、特种场景切入，预示具身智能从「实验室演示」全面切换到「商用部署」。
articles.content_en: From June 24 to 26, MWC Shanghai 2026 and the third China Supply Chain Expo opened in parallel, with embodied AI taking center stage. MWC hosted its first 'humanoid robot penalty shootout' with eight teams competing over two days, while the supply chain expo presented a full loop from core components and integrated robots to real-world applications. Morgan Stanley raised its 2026 China humanoid delivery target to 50,000 units in May; IDC lifted its global shipment outlook to 42,000 units, up 133% YoY. Domestically, key parts—e-skin, visuo-tactile sensors—are crossing the 10,000-unit threshold for the first time; Wahweo disclosed cumulative e-skin shipments past 10,000 in June, on track for an annualized 50,000-unit run rate. Four leaders—Tesla Optimus, UBTech Walker, Xiaomi CyberOne, Boston Dynamics Atlas—plus China's DeepRobotics shared the stage, each targeting industrial, logistics or specialty deployments. The industry is shifting decisively from lab demos to commercial deployment.
key_points: MWC 与链博会双展同步开张
国内 2026 年交付目标上调至 5 万台
全球出货预期 4.2 万台、同比 +133%
电子皮肤等核心部件跨过万套级量产门槛
key_points_en: MWC Shanghai and China Supply Chain Expo opened in parallel
China 2026 delivery target lifted to 50,000 units
Global shipments expected at 42,000, up 133% YoY
Core parts like e-skin cross 10,000-unit mass-production threshold

hero.title: GPT-5.5 Instant 全量推送：OpenAI 把「准旗舰」能力下沉到 9 亿免费用户
hero.title_en: GPT-5.5 Instant Rolls Out Free: OpenAI Pushes Near-Flagship Capabilities to 900M Users
hero.source: OpenAI / 凤凰网 / 智东西
hero.summary: OpenAI 于 6 月 25 日宣布 GPT-5.5 Instant 完成升级，付费用户当日开放、免费用户 6 月 26 日全面开放，直接取代 GPT-5.3 Instant 成为 ChatGPT 全平台默认模型。新版幻觉率较上代下降 52.5%、AIME 数学准确率从 65.4% 跃升至 81.2%，输出字数减少约 30%；上下文窗口按层级分层（免费 16K / Plus 32K / Pro 128K），内置智能路由自动切换 Thinking 深度推理。在 Claude、Gemini、Polaris 三面夹击下，这次默认模型大换血被视为 OpenAI 的「体验防守牌」。
hero.summary_en: On June 25, OpenAI announced the GPT-5.5 Instant upgrade—available to paid users that day and rolling out to free users on June 26—directly replacing GPT-5.3 Instant as the default model across ChatGPT. Hallucination rate dropped 52.5% vs. the prior version, AIME math accuracy jumped from 65.4% to 81.2%, and average reply length shrank ~30%. Context window is now tiered (16K free / 32K Plus / 128K Pro) with an intelligent router that silently escalates complex queries to Thinking mode. Under pressure from Claude, Gemini and Microsoft's in-house Polaris, this default-model swap is widely read as OpenAI's experience-defense play.

articles.title: OpenAI发布首颗自研芯片Jalapeño：推理专用，与博通9个月完成，年底规模部署
articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches First Custom Chip Jalapeño: Inference-Only, Built with Broadcom in 9 Months
articles.summary: OpenAI正式公布首颗自研AI芯片Jalapeño，合作方为博通，专为推理任务设计而非训练，目标是用最少的电、最快地回答用户问题。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI officially unveiled its first self-developed AI chip Jalapeño, partnered with Broadcom, designed exclusively for inference rather than training, aiming to answer user questions fastest with least power consumption.
articles.content:
2026年6月25日，OpenAI正式公布了自研AI芯片Jalapeño，合作方为博通（Broadcom）。这是继谷歌TPU、亚马逊Trainium、微软Maia之后，又一科技巨头切入AI芯片赛道。

OpenAI透露，从芯片立项到实物到手仅用了9个月时间，这一速度在芯片行业堪称神速。Jalapeño的核心设计理念是「推理专用」——与现有的AI芯片多为训练模型优化不同，Jalapeño专为「考试」设计，不做「备考」的事。它的目标只有一个：用最少的电、最快地回答用户的问题。

OpenAI表示，早期测试显示Jalapeño的每瓦性能比目前市面上最好的水平还要好很多，具体数据将在几个月内发布技术报告。Jalapeño预计在2026年年底开始规模化部署。

值得关注的是，Jalapeño芯片的设计过程中用到了OpenAI自己的AI来辅助加速，实现「用AI设计跑AI的芯片」。这是继Anthropic用AI设计芯片架构之后，又一AI公司采用类似策略。

分析认为，OpenAI自研芯片的核心动机是降低成本。当前Anthropic每月需向马斯克租用算力，花费高达12.5亿美元；H200在中国市场价格涨至400多万元，B300近1000万元。「天下苦英伟达久矣」，各厂商都在寻找替代方案。
articles.content_en:
On June 25, 2026, OpenAI officially unveiled its first self-developed AI chip Jalapeño in partnership with Broadcom. This marks another tech giant entering the AI chip market after Google's TPU, Amazon's Trainium, and Microsoft's Maia.

OpenAI revealed the entire process from chip conception to physical delivery took only 9 months — remarkably fast in the semiconductor industry. Jalapeño's core design philosophy is "inference-only" — unlike existing AI chips optimized for training, Jalapeño is exclusively designed for "exam-taking." Its single goal: answer user questions fastest with least power consumption.

OpenAI stated early testing shows Jalapeño's per-watt performance significantly exceeds current market best results, with detailed data to be published in a technical report within months. Jalapeño is expected to begin large-scale deployment by end of 2026.

Notably, the chip design process utilized OpenAI's own AI to assist acceleration — achieving "using AI to design chips that run AI." This follows Anthropic's similar strategy of using AI to design chip architectures.

Analysts believe OpenAI's core motivation is cost reduction. Currently Anthropic pays $1.25 billion monthly to rent compute from Musk, while H200 prices in China have risen to over 4 million yuan. With "everyone suffering from NVIDIA dominance," each vendor is seeking alternatives.
key_points: OpenAI首颗自研芯片Jalapeño发布，博通合作9个月完成
专为推理设计不做训练，目标用最少电最快回答问题
每瓦性能优于市面最好水平，年底规模部署
芯片设计用AI辅助加速，实现用魔法打败魔法
自研芯片核心动机：降低算力成本，H200中国超400万元
key_points_en: OpenAI launches first chip Jalapeño with Broadcom in 9 months
Inference-only design fastest answers with least power
Per-watt performance exceeds current best deployment by year-end
AI used to design chip that runs AI
Core motivation: reduce compute costs H200 China over 4M yuan

articles.title: 谷歌再失两员AI大将：Gemini核心贡献者跳槽Anthropic，Alphabet股价下挫
articles.title_en: Google Loses Two More AI Stars: Gemini Key Contributors Defect to Anthropic, Alphabet Stock Drops
articles.summary: 谷歌Gemini项目核心贡献者Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel计划离职转投Anthropic。这是继诺贝尔化学奖得主John Jumper、前Gemini负责人Noam Shazeer之后，谷歌再次遭遇核心人才流失。
articles.summary_en: Google Gemini project key contributors Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel plan to leave for Anthropic. This marks Google's latest core talent loss after Nobel laureate John Jumper and former Gemini lead Noam Shazeer.
articles.content:
2026年6月25日，知情人士透露Alphabet旗下谷歌的两名AI研究干将计划转投竞争对手Anthropic。被视为谷歌Gemini大模型关键贡献者的Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel即将加入Anthropic。Adler曾参与谷歌的AI编程项目，而Pritzel则参与AI系统训练工作。

此前已有多名AI领域核心人才从谷歌出走：Transformer架构核心论文《注意力就是你所需要的一切》共同作者、前Gemini项目联合负责人Noam Shazeer离职后加入OpenAI；曾主导AlphaFold项目、共同获得2024年诺贝尔化学奖的John Jumper即将入职Anthropic。

6月22日，谷歌母公司Alphabet股价下跌5%-6%，部分市场观察人士认为该下跌与市场担忧其AI领域竞争前景相关。这一系列人事变动凸显出谷歌面临的竞争压力：Anthropic、OpenAI两家初创企业即将启动IPO，员工在上市前入职可获得一笔罕见的高额股权收益，这对头部科技大厂的资深研发人员吸引力极强。

随着Anthropic、OpenAI持续吸纳行业知名人才并筹备潜在IPO，相关变动对谷歌造成的财务及战略层面影响将持续受到市场密切关注。
articles.content_en:
On June 25, 2026, sources revealed two of Google's AI research leads plan to defect to competitor Anthropic. Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, key contributors to Google's Gemini large model, are joining Anthropic. Adler participated in Google's AI coding project while Pritzel worked on AI system training.

Previously, multiple core AI talents exited Google: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the Transformer architecture paper "Attention Is All You Need" and former Gemini co-lead, left for OpenAI; John Jumper, who led the AlphaFold project and co-won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry, is joining Anthropic.

On June 22, Alphabet stock dropped 5%-6%, with some market observers attributing this to concerns about Google's AI competitive prospects. These personnel changes highlight Google's competitive pressure: Anthropic and OpenAI preparing for IPOs offer rare high equity compensation before listing, extremely attractive to senior researchers at major tech firms.

As Anthropic and OpenAI continue recruiting top talent while preparing IPOs, the financial and strategic impact on Google will remain under market scrutiny.
key_points: 谷歌Gemini两员大将Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel跳槽Anthropic
此前Shazeer已加入OpenAI、诺贝尔奖得主Jumper将加入Anthropic
Alphabet股价6月22日下跌5%-6%，市场担忧AI竞争前景
Anthropic和OpenAI筹备IPO吸引人才，高额股权收益极具吸引力
谷歌面临严峻人才竞争压力，初创企业对资深研发吸引力大
key_points_en: Google Gemini stars Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel defect to Anthropic
Shazeer already joined OpenAI Nobel winner Jumper also heading to Anthropic
Alphabet dropped 5%-6% on June 22 market fears over AI competitiveness
Anthropic OpenAI IPO prep attracts talent with high equity compensation
Google faces severe talent competition startup lure for senior researchers intensifies

articles.title: 美光科技Q3营收翻四倍：AI驱动内存需求爆发，预计供应紧张延续至2027年后
articles.title_en: Micron Q3 Revenue Quadruples: AI Drives Memory Demand Surge, Supply Crunch Expected Through 2027+
articles.summary: 美光科技第三财季营收较一年前的93亿美元大幅增长，净利润达282亿美元，毛利率跃升至84.9%。公司预计内存供应紧张将持续至2027年之后。
articles.summary_en: Micron's fiscal Q3 revenue surged from $9.3 billion a year ago, with net profit reaching $28.2 billion and gross margin jumping to 84.9%. The company expects memory supply crunch to persist beyond 2027.
articles.content:
美光科技美股盘后发布财报，第三财季营收较一年前的93亿美元大幅增长。对于当前季度，公司预计营收约为500亿美元，而一年前同期仅为113亿美元。分析师此前的营收预测为435.8亿美元，实际表现远超预期。

当季公司净利润为282.4亿美元，合每股24.46美元；而去年同期净利润为18.9亿美元，合每股1.68美元。美光科技的毛利率在第三季度跃升至84.9%，高于上一季度的74.9%以及去年同期的39%，这一利润率表现同样超出分析师预期。

美光科技表示，受AI驱动的需求影响，预计内存供应紧张的局面将持续至2027年之后。公司还披露，已与数据中心运营商和汽车制造商等客户签署了16项长期协议，锁定了为期3至5年的销售额。

值得关注的是，美光已与Anthropic达成战略合作，三大存储巨头（美光、三星、SK海力士）同步被列入Anthropic的战略投资方名单。HBM市场规模2025年约350亿美元，2028年预计冲至1000亿美元。
articles.content_en:
Micron Technology released earnings after market close, with fiscal Q3 revenue surging dramatically from $9.3 billion a year ago. For the current quarter, the company projects revenue of approximately $50 billion versus $11.3 billion in the same period last year. Analysts had forecast $43.58 billion, significantly below actual results.

Quarterly net profit reached $28.24 billion, or $24.46 per share, compared to $1.89 billion or $1.68 per share year-over-year. Micron's gross margin jumped to 84.9% in Q3, up from 74.9% in the prior quarter and 39% in the same period last year, also exceeding analyst expectations.

Micron stated that AI-driven demand means memory supply tightness is expected to persist beyond 2027. The company also disclosed signing 16 long-term agreements with data center operators and automotive manufacturers, locking in 3-5 years of sales.

Notably, Micron has formed a strategic partnership with Anthropic, with all three major memory makers — Micron, Samsung, and SK Hynix — listed as Anthropic's strategic investors. The HBM market is projected at approximately $35 billion in 2025, reaching $100 billion by 2028.
key_points: 美光Q3营收翻四倍超500亿美元，净利润282亿美元
毛利率84.9%创历史新高，AI驱动内存需求爆发
已与客户签署16项长期协议，锁定3至5年销售额
供应紧张预计延续至2027年后，HBM市场三年翻三倍
三大存储巨头同步参投Anthropic，资本绑定锁定产能
key_points_en: Micron Q3 revenue quadruples to 50B profit 28.2B
Gross margin 84.9% record high AI drives memory demand
Signed 16 long-term agreements locking 3-5 year sales
Supply crunch through 2027+ HBM market triples in 3 years
Three memory giants invest in Anthropic capital binding locks capacity

articles.title: 高通拿下Meta数据中心处理器订单：Dragonfly C1000芯片2028年上市
articles.title_en: Qualcomm Wins Meta Data Center Processor Order: Dragonfly C1000 Coming 2028
articles.summary: 高通宣布Meta将在其基础设施中使用新款数据中心处理器Dragonfly C1000及后续产品，这是高通AI硬件业务的重大突破，微处理器将于2028年上市。
articles.summary_en: Qualcomm announced Meta will use its new data center processor Dragonfly C1000 and follow-on products in its infrastructure, a major breakthrough for Qualcomm's AI hardware business with the microprocessor launching in 2028.
articles.content:
高通公司在纽约举办的活动上宣布，Meta Platforms已同意在其基础设施中使用高通的新款数据中心处理器Dragonfly C1000芯片及后续产品。这标志着这家手机芯片制造商在蓬勃发展的人工智能设备市场站稳脚跟。

总部位于加州圣迭戈的高通称，这款微处理器将于2028年上市。这是高通在AI硬件领域的重大突破，此前高通主要专注于移动设备芯片市场。

与此同时，高通与Hugging Face扩大合作，共同推进跨设备到云环境的开放AI生态，支持模型在端侧与云端双轨运行。高通AI Hub支持TensorFlow Lite、ONNX Runtime及Qualcomm AI Engine等主流框架，开发者可一次开发、多端部署。

端侧AI推理生态正在加速——随着芯片AI算力持续提升，越来越多大模型能力将从云端下沉至手机、PC等终端设备运行，降低延迟、保护隐私、减少云端依赖。
articles.content_en:
Qualcomm announced at an event in New York that Meta Platforms has agreed to use its new data center processor Dragonfly C1000 chip and follow-on products in its infrastructure. This marks a major breakthrough for the San Diego-based chipmaker in the flourishing AI device market.

Qualcomm stated this microprocessor will launch in 2028. This represents Qualcomm's significant expansion into AI hardware beyond its traditional mobile device chip market.

Simultaneously, Qualcomm expanded its partnership with Hugging Face to advance open AI ecosystems across device-to-cloud environments, supporting dual on-device and cloud model deployment. Qualcomm AI Hub supports TensorFlow Lite, ONNX Runtime, and Qualcomm AI Engine, enabling developers to build once and deploy everywhere.

On-device AI inference ecosystems are accelerating — as chip AI computing power increases, more large model capabilities are moving from cloud to mobile phones, PCs, and other endpoints, reducing latency, protecting privacy, and minimizing cloud dependency.
key_points: 高通Dragonfly C1000获Meta数据中心订单2028年上市
高通AI硬件业务取得重大突破进入数据中心领域
与Hugging Face扩大合作推进跨端云开放AI生态
一次开发多端部署，端侧AI推理生态加速
大模型能力从云端下沉至终端设备成趋势
key_points_en: Qualcomm Dragonfly C1000 wins Meta data center order launching 2028
Qualcomm AI hardware major breakthrough entering data center space
Expands Hugging Face partnership for cross-device-cloud AI ecosystem
Build once deploy everywhere on-device AI inference accelerating
Large model capabilities shifting from cloud to endpoints trend

articles.title: AI公司重新定义资本：DeepSeek、OpenAI与Anthropic的治理结构革命
articles.title_en: AI Companies Redefining Capital: DeepSeek, OpenAI and Anthropic's Governance Revolutions
articles.summary: DeepSeek融资条款揭示投资人不投票、资本不参与决策的新模式。AI公司正在用不同方式重新定义「谁有权决定AI往哪里走」，这是比技术路线更深层的竞争。
articles.summary_en: DeepSeek's financing terms reveal a new model where investors have no voting rights and capital doesn't participate in decisions. AI companies are redefining 'who has the right to decide where AI goes' in different ways.
articles.content:
DeepSeek被曝出的融资条款显示：投资人没有投票权、不以传统股权治理方式参与决策、资金还被长期锁定。这种「把钱跟决策权拆成两个不同系统」的模式，正成为AI行业的新常态。

DeepSeek代表的是资本与控制权的分离——资本进入之后，不自动进入决策链条，发展由技术团队说了算，就像投钱建厂但生产线独立运营。

OpenAI则是让资本、技术、治理同时进入系统，但用分层结构互相制衡：技术系统追求更强AI，商业系统关心成本与变现，董事会约束能力与安全，三层各有独立判断，最终落地的是三方都能接受的版本。

Anthropic的关键创新是「宪法式AI」——在训练AI时就画好边界，把规则写进模型里，让系统从一开始就按规则长出来，而非等AI做出来再管。

这三家公司的治理结构差异将深刻影响产品路线：OpenAI更灵活易变，Anthropic更稳定保守，DeepSeek更便宜开放。对企业来说，选AI不只是选能力，更是选一种「AI的性格与边界」。
articles.content_en:
DeepSeek's disclosed financing terms show: investors have no voting rights, don't participate in decisions through traditional equity governance, and capital is long-term locked. This model of "separating money from decision-making" is becoming the new normal in AI.

DeepSeek represents separation of capital and control — capital enters but doesn't automatically enter the decision chain; development is decided by the technical team, like investing in a factory with independent production lines.

OpenAI allows capital, technology, and governance into the system simultaneously, but uses layered structures for mutual checks: technology pursues stronger AI, business cares about costs and monetization, the board constrains capabilities and safety, each layer has independent judgment, with final outcomes being what all three accept.

Anthropic's key innovation is "Constitutional AI" — drawing boundaries during AI training, writing rules into the model so the system grows according to rules from the start, rather than managing AI after it's created.

These three companies' different governance structures will profoundly affect product paths: OpenAI more flexible and changeable, Anthropic more stable and conservative, DeepSeek more affordable and open. For enterprises, choosing AI isn't just choosing capabilities, but choosing an "AI personality and boundaries."

AI公司不仅卖产品，更在设计产品如何被控制

Governance determines product path: flexible vs stable vs open

AI companies not just selling products but designing how products are controlled

articles.title: 马里兰大学等机构研究：AI模型学会「局部改稿」，反射性遮蔽技术突破
articles.title_en: University of Maryland Research: AI Models Learn "Local Revision" with Reflective Masking Breakthrough
articles.summary: 马里兰大学等机构联合研究发布新方法，让AI模型具备「局部改稿」能力——像人一样只修改有问题的段落，其他部分完好保留。
articles.summary_en: University of Maryland and partners release research enabling AI models with "local revision" capability — like humans, only modifying problematic sections while preserving others.
articles.content:
马里兰大学、弗吉尼亚理工大学、Intuit、加州大学戴维斯分校和阿布扎比穆罕默德·本·扎耶德人工智能大学联合开展的研究，于2026年6月以预印本形式发布。

当前主流的AI文字生成系统有一个根本性局限：它们从左到右逐词生成，一旦写出来的内容有问题，就得把后面所有内容全部推倒重来。研究团队找到了一种方法，让特定类型的AI模型真正学会「局部改稿」的能力。

研究团队将激活这种主动自我修正能力的方法命名为「反射性遮蔽」（Reflective Masking）。其核心思想是：要求模型不仅能填空，还能主动判断「我现在还认为这个词是对的吗？」如果不对，就重新打上MASK标记，让自己再预测一次。

为了解决反复改同一个错误的问题，研究团队引入了「历史参考」（History Reference）机制——在每次做出「保留还是遮蔽」的决策时，模型不仅能看到当前的序列状态，还能感知到这个位置在过去几步的变化历史。

这意味着AI正在从「一次成型」向「迭代优化」进化，更接近人类写作的思维方式。
articles.content_en:
A joint research effort by the University of Maryland, Virginia Tech, Intuit, UC Davis, and Mohamed bin Zayed University of AI released findings as a preprint in June 2026.

Current mainstream AI text generation systems have a fundamental limitation: they generate left-to-right, word-by-word, and if something is wrong, everything after must be regenerated. The research team found a way to enable AI models to truly learn "local revision" capability.

The team named this method for activating proactive self-correction "Reflective Masking." Its core idea: requiring models not only to fill in blanks but to actively judge "Do I still think this word is correct?" If not, reapply MASK and predict again.

To solve the problem of repeatedly making the same error, the team introduced a "History Reference" mechanism — when making "keep or mask" decisions, the model can see not only the current sequence state but also sense the position's change history over recent steps.

This means AI is evolving from "one-shot generation" toward "iterative optimization," more closely matching human writing thinking.
key_points: 马里兰大学等联合研究让AI学会局部改稿能力
当前AI从左到右生成出错需全部推倒重来

历史参考机制解决反复犯同一个错误的问题
AI从一次成型向迭代优化进化更接近人类思维
key_points_en: University of Maryland research enables AI local revision capability
Current AI left-to-right generation requires full regeneration on errors
Reflective Masking enables models to judge correctness proactively
History Reference solves problem of repeating same errors
AI evolving from one-shot to iterative optimization closer to human thinking

articles.title: GitHub 21k星！AirLLM：单卡4GB显存跑70B大模型重新定义LLM推理
articles.title_en: GitHub 21k Stars! AirLLM: Run 70B Models on 4GB GPU Revolutionizes LLM Inference
articles.summary: AirLLM通过分层加载技术让普通显卡也能跑70B大模型，无需量化、不需蒸馏，4GB显存即可运行，降低大模型推理门槛。
articles.summary_en: AirLLM enables consumer GPUs to run 70B models through layer-wise loading without quantization or distillation, requiring only 4GB VRAM, democratizing large model inference.
articles.content:
AirLLM是一个让你在消费级GPU上跑超大参数模型的推理框架。核心卖点：不需要量化、不需要蒸馏、不需要剪枝，一张4GB显存的显卡就能跑70B参数的LLM。如果显卡稍微好点，8GB显存更是能跑Llama 3.1 405B。

项目已在GitHub拿下21K+星，解决的是大模型推理的门槛问题：70B模型正常加载需要140GB+显存，405B模型更是要800GB+，普通开发者和中小企业根本玩不起。

AirLLM的核心思路很巧妙：大模型推理的瓶颈主要在显存而不是算力。传统方式是把整个模型一次性加载到GPU显存，而AirLLM把模型按层拆分，每次只加载一层所需的权重到GPU，计算完成后卸载，再加载下一层。

这种方案有几个关键优势：显存占用极低（峰值≈单层参数量）、无需量化（保持完整精度）、兼容主流模型（Llama、ChatGLM、Qwen、Baichuan、Mistral、InternLM等）。

v2.0还引入了基于分块量化的模型压缩技术，可将推理速度提升3倍，精度损失几乎可以忽略不计。
articles.content_en:
AirLLM is an inference framework allowing consumer GPUs to run super large parameter models. Core selling point: no quantization, no distillation, no pruning — 4GB VRAM can run 70B parameter LLMs. With slightly better GPUs, 8GB can run Llama 3.1 405B.

The project has garnered 21K+ stars on GitHub, solving the barrier to large model inference: 70B models normally require 140GB+ VRAM, 405B models need 800GB+, unaffordable for regular developers and SMEs.

AirLLM's clever approach: large model inference bottlenecks are primarily in VRAM not compute. Traditional methods load entire models into GPU VRAM at once, while AirLLM splits models by layer, loading only one layer's weights at a time, then unloading and loading the next.

Key advantages: extremely low VRAM usage (peak ≈ single layer parameters), no quantization (maintains full precision), compatible with mainstream models (Llama, ChatGLM, Qwen, Baichuan, Mistral, InternLM, etc.).

Version 2.0 introduces block-wise quantization for model compression, boosting inference speed 3x with negligible accuracy loss.
key_points: AirLLM：4GB显存跑70B模型无需量化保持完整精度
GitHub 21k星解决大模型推理门槛问题
分层加载技术把模型按层拆分每次只加载一层
v2.0分块量化技术可将推理速度提升3倍
兼容Llama/Qwen/ChatGLM等主流开源模型
key_points_en: AirLLM: 4GB VRAM runs 70B model no quantization full precision
GitHub 21k stars solving large model inference barriers
Layer-wise loading splits models loading only one layer at a time
v2.0 block quantization boosts inference speed 3x
Compatible with Llama Qwen ChatGLM mainstream open source models

articles.title: 2026新质生产力风口：AI训练师、数据标注员等新兴岗位疯狂抢人
articles.title_en: 2026 New Quality Productivity: AI Trainers and Data Labelers Among Hottest New Jobs
articles.summary: 2026年新质生产力赛道持续火爆，AI训练师、数据标注员、提示词工程师等新兴岗位需求激增，成为职场转型新方向。
articles.summary_en: 2026 sees sustained boom in new quality productivity with surging demand for AI trainers, data labelers, and prompt engineers as emerging job categories.
articles.content:
2026年新质生产力风口持续火爆，AI相关新兴岗位成为人才市场最抢手的香饽饽。

AI训练师：负责训练和优化AI模型，需要具备机器学习基础和行业知识，能够理解数据、调整参数、评估效果。随着AI在各行业落地，对AI训练师的需求持续增长。

数据标注员：作为AI产业的基础岗位，数据标注的质量直接决定AI模型的效果。从图像标注到文本标注，从语音标注到视频标注，需求覆盖各类型数据处理场景。

提示词工程师：专门优化与AI交互的提示词，帮助提升AI输出质量和效率。这一岗位需要深入理解AI的工作原理，同时具备良好的语言表达能力。

AI产品经理：负责AI产品的规划、设计和运营，需要同时懂技术和懂用户，能够将AI能力转化为用户价值。

行业观察人士指出，这些新兴岗位的共同特点是「跨界复合」——既需要技术理解力，又需要业务洞察力，正成为职场转型的新方向。
articles.content_en:
2026's new quality productivity wave continues to boom, with AI-related emerging positions becoming the most sought-after in the talent market.

AI Trainers: Responsible for training and optimizing AI models, requiring machine learning basics and industry knowledge to understand data, adjust parameters, and evaluate results. Demand continues growing as AI deploys across industries.

Data Labelers: As a foundational AI industry role, data labeling quality directly determines AI model effectiveness. From image to text, voice to video labeling, demand covers all data processing scenarios.

Prompt Engineers: Specializing in optimizing prompts for AI interaction to improve output quality and efficiency. This role requires deep understanding of AI operations plus strong language skills.

AI Product Managers: Responsible for AI product planning, design, and operations, needing both technical and user understanding to translate AI capabilities into user value.

Industry observers note these emerging roles share a "cross-disciplinary" characteristic — requiring both technical understanding and business insight, becoming a new direction for career transformation.

AI产品经理负责将AI能力转化为用户价值
新兴岗位共同特点：跨界复合懂技术又懂业务
数据标注质量直接决定AI模型效果
新质生产力赛道持续火爆职场转型新方向

AI product managers translate AI capabilities into user value
Emerging roles share cross-disciplinary tech plus business understanding

New quality productivity booms creating career transformation opportunities

articles.title: 高通与Hugging Face扩大合作：推进跨端云开放AI生态，端云协同成趋势
articles.title_en: Qualcomm and Hugging Face Expand Partnership: Cross-Device-Cloud Open AI Ecosystem Progresses
articles.summary: 高通与Hugging Face宣布扩大合作伙伴关系，共同推进跨设备到云环境的开放AI生态，端侧AI推理生态加速发展。
articles.summary_en: Qualcomm and Hugging Face announced expanded partnership to advance open AI ecosystem across device-to-cloud, accelerating on-device AI inference ecosystem development.
articles.content:
高通与全球最大AI开源社区Hugging Face宣布扩大合作伙伴关系，共同推进跨设备到云环境的开放、开发者驱动的人工智能发展。

根据新合作协议，高通将持续为开发者提供工具与基础设施，支持AI模型在端侧与云端双轨运行。高通AI Hub支持TensorFlow Lite、ONNX Runtime及Qualcomm AI Engine等主流框架，开发者可一次开发、多端部署。

此举标志着端侧AI推理的生态加速——随着骁龙芯片AI算力持续提升，越来越多大模型能力将从云端下沉至手机、PC等终端设备运行，降低延迟、保护隐私、减少云端依赖。

这也是Hugging Face继与亚马逊、谷歌云合作后，又一大硬件平台合作，开源AI模型从云端优先向端云协同的演进趋势愈发清晰。
articles.content_en:
Qualcomm and Hugging Face, the world's largest AI open source community, announced an expanded partnership to jointly advance open, developer-driven AI development across device-to-cloud environments.

Under the new agreement, Qualcomm continues providing developers with tools and infrastructure supporting AI models running both on-device and in the cloud. Qualcomm AI Hub supports TensorFlow Lite, ONNX Runtime, and Qualcomm AI Engine, enabling developers to build once and deploy everywhere.

This marks acceleration of on-device AI inference ecosystems — as Snapdragon chip AI computing power increases, more large model capabilities move from cloud to mobile phones, PCs, and other endpoints, reducing latency, protecting privacy, and minimizing cloud dependency.

This is also Hugging Face's latest major hardware platform partnership following collaborations with Amazon and Google Cloud, with the trend of open source AI evolving from cloud-first to device-cloud collaboration becoming increasingly clear.
key_points: 高通与Hugging Face扩大合作推进跨端云AI生态
支持AI模型端侧加云端双轨运行一次开发多端部署

Hugging Face继亚马逊谷歌云后又一大硬件平台合作
开源AI从云端优先向端云协同演进趋势清晰

Supporting dual on-device plus cloud model deployment build once deploy everywhere
On-device AI inference accelerating large models shifting cloud to endpoints
Hugging Face latest major hardware partnership after Amazon Google Cloud
Open source AI evolving cloud-first to device-cloud collaboration trend clear

articles.title: 36氪深度：Chatbot增长见顶资本全面转向Agent赛道，2026年AI格局重塑
articles.title_en: 36Kr Deep Dive: Chatbot Growth Peaks as Capital Fully Pivots to Agent Track, AI Landscape Reshapes
articles.summary: 36氪分析揭示chatbot赛道增量逼近天花板，4月TOP20中9大产品访问量下滑。Claude逆势增长34.18%因完成chatbot到agent的范式转移，资本全面转向agent赛道。
articles.summary_en: 36Kr analysis reveals chatbot growth ceiling, with 9 of top 20 products seeing declining traffic in April. Claude's 34.18% counter-trend growth driven by chatbot-to-agent paradigm shift, capital fully pivots to agent track.
articles.content:
36氪发布深度分析文章，系统梳理2026年AI从chatbot到agent的范式转移。

核心发现：chatbot赛道增量已逼近天花板。AI产品榜数据显示，2026年4月chatbot榜单TOP20中9大产品网站访问量出现下滑，ChatGPT虽以5.69亿访问量领先但环比负增长3.84%。

而Claude逆势增长34.18%，原因在于完成了从被动问答chatbot到主动代劳agent的范式转移。Claude Co-Work功能可跨软件长流程全自动执行，高频自动化交互直接推高Token消耗和访问量。

资本市场转向更为彻底：a16z持续多轮押注编程agent Cursor，红杉投资智能客服agent Sierra，Coatue投资企业客服agent Decagon。国内，阿里、腾讯等大厂也已将资源整合，投向自身agent能力搭建。

YC W26约200家创业公司中，大量AI项目重心在agent而非chatbot。这一变化表明：chatbot越来越成为平台生态中的基础能力，而非独立的创业赛道。
articles.content_en:
36Kr published in-depth analysis systematically reviewing AI's paradigm shift from chatbot to agent in 2026.

Key finding: chatbot growth has hit a ceiling. AI Product Index data shows 9 of top 20 chatbot products saw declining website traffic in April 2026, with ChatGPT's 569 million visits showing -3.84% month-over-month decline.

Claude bucked the trend with 34.18% growth, driven by completing the paradigm shift from passive Q&A chatbot to proactive agent. Claude Co-Work enables cross-software, long-process fully autonomous execution, with high-frequency automated interactions directly driving token consumption and visit growth.

Capital market pivot is decisive: a16z continues multi-round bets on coding agent Cursor, Sequoia invests in customer service agent Sierra, Coatue funds enterprise customer service agent Decagon. Domestically, Alibaba, Tencent, and other major players have consolidated resources toward their own agent capability development.

At YC W26, among ~200 startups, many AI projects focus on agents rather than chatbots. This change indicates: chatbots are increasingly becoming basic capabilities within platform ecosystems rather than independent entrepreneurial tracks.

ChatGPT领先但环比负增长3.84%增长红利消退
Claude逆势增长34.18%完成chatbot到agent范式转移
资本全面转向agent：a16z押注Cursor红杉投Sierra
Chatbot成平台基础能力而非独立创业赛道

ChatGPT leads but -3.84% MoM growth dividend fading

hero.summary_en: AI chip demand has pushed advanced packaging from the back-end to the core of the value chain: ASE Q2 net profit +58% YoY, CoWoS shortfall still at 20-25%, JCET secured 7.8B yuan Lingang fab with target price raised to 110 yuan, HBM capacity to triple in three years.
